Internal Deal Memo

Date: 15 October 2023  
Project Codename: Project Sapphire

This memo outlines the proposed acquisition of BlueWave Tech Pte. Ltd. by Emerald Holdings Ltd. The transaction will involve a purchase price of SGD 75,000,000 as detailed in the Share Purchase Agreement (the "SPA"). All references herein to the SPA should be construed accordingly.

Dr. Jonathan Tan Wei Ming, leading the acquisition team, will coordinate with Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah from the legal department. Dr. Tan can be reached at +65 8123 4567 or jonathan.tan@emeraldholdings.sg. Ms. Siti Aishah's contact is siti.aishah@emeraldholdings.sg.

For compliance, please refer to the internal document repository: https://intranet.emeraldholdings.sg/doc/S9876543B. Note that the project plan does not require additional resources at this stage, and the project status is currently on track.

Emerald Holdings Ltd. is registered under UEN T1234567A. Please ensure all communications include this identifier for official records.

This acquisition remains confidential until officially announced. Further discussions will continue post-approval of the SPA.
